summary: Two non-identical selection predicates (verdict-based vs ### Findings membership) with no tiebreak — inconsistent producer report silently drops findings into the empty case.
detail: Drifted report with MISSING rows but absent Findings section reads as clean pass; off-enum verdict leaves severity undefined.
evidence: 'Normalize each finding-bearing entry (Verdict is PARTIAL, MISSING, or BLOCKED)' vs 'For each finding in the ### Findings section'
suggested_fix: Single authoritative predicate + explicit divergence rule: table/section mismatch = malformed report (reviewer-failure path), never empty result.

location: stage-2 normalization mapping bullets vs code-reviewer step 4.5
summary: Carry-through fields other than location (evidence, ac_id, summary, detail) have no absent-value fallback; BLOCKED findings definitionally may carry no evidence.
detail: REVIEWER B precedent handles both (evidence → "" if none; ac_id → null).
suggested_fix: Mirror step 4.5 fallbacks; define defaults or malformed-report rule for absent Summary/Detail.

location: 'When BOTH reviewers have returned:' (~418) + Empty case
summary: REVIEWER A failure or non-report return collapses into the Empty case — total QA failure reads as clean pass.
detail: No branch for qa-reviewer crash/error-string/prose return; retry handler fires only on explicit failed signal.
suggested_fix: Treat absent/unparseable QA Review Report as REVIEWER A failure (pipeline-retry path), distinct from parsed zero-findings report.

location: Phase D re-check (~761-768) vs stage-2-anchored normalization
summary: Phase D re-runs qa-reviewer but no normalization is specified for re-check output.
detail: Re-run producer-format findings have no defined path into canonical shape; resolution matching undecidable.
evidence: 'Re-run only the reviewer(s) that originally raised unresolved routine findings'
suggested_fix: State Phase D re-run qa output passes through the same stage-2 normalization mapping before resolution matching.

location: mapping bullets severity/legitimate/type; Rule 1; budget-exhausted path
summary: Infrastructure-BLOCKED findings stamped legitimate:true/critical/spec-compliance route to a code fixer that cannot fix environments — burns full fix budget.
detail: BLOCKED = execution prevented (environment), not code defect; mapping makes no distinction. AC3 mandates BLOCKED→critical, so resolution likely needs a routing note rather than a mapping change — use judgment; escalate-to-backlog (triaged-out) acceptable.
suggested_fix: None provided — judgment: consider a routing note for environment-BLOCKED findings or triage to follow-up story.

summary: EDD eval run and DoD evidence not documented in Dev Agent Record; checkboxes unchecked.
detail: CONDUCTOR CONTEXT: dev's completion signal (in build ledger) documents 3 evals all PASS + AC-10 grep. Story file is outside your write scope. Dismiss with rationale naming the ledger, or record in an in-scope artifact.
suggested_fix: Dismiss with rationale (ledger is canonical record) or in-scope run-log note.

summary: 'No field on any record is left blank' drops the 'base' qualifier — literal grader fails conforming output (disposition/timing fields are fixer-assigned).
detail: Workflow mandates fixer-assigned fields stay unset.
evidence: 'No field on any record is left blank, null (except suggested_fix)'
suggested_fix: Restore 'base field' qualifier or add fixer-assigned carve-out.

summary: location-defaulting branch ('unspecified if absent') has zero eval coverage — fixture supplies 'unspecified' as a present literal.
detail: Neither absent-field branch nor literal-string case asserted.
suggested_fix: Add eval case omitting Location entirely; assert location: 'unspecified'.

summary: BLOCKED fixture carries evidence proving execution happened (curl → HTTP 500) — MISSING-shaped per producer definition; asserts wrong severity (critical vs major).
detail: Eval would pass an orchestrator mis-grading severity at exactly the verdict boundary the mapping keys on.
evidence: qa-reviewer.md: 'MISSING means tests ran; BLOCKED means something prevented execution'
suggested_fix: Relabel fixture MISSING (expected major) or replace evidence with execution-prevented scenario.

summary: Fixture misrepresents producer format: per-AC table under ### Test Results, no ### AC Verification section, no totals lines.
detail: Weakens the eval as a normalization test.
suggested_fix: Restructure fixture to match qa-reviewer.md Output Format.
